zh.lifeSummary: 當Vanessa Travis於1545年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Eugene Travis25歲，母親Sarah Lockard20歲。她於1569年與William Ragsdale在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1609年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Travis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): from Old French and Middle English travers, also Middle English travas, travis, a word with several meanings. It may denote a toll paid for the right to cross a boundary or bridge, the surname perhaps being for someone who paid or collected such tolls. Alternatively, it may mean ‘crosswise, sideways’ or ‘dispute, disagreement’. The Old French word also had the sense ‘crossing, passage’, and it is more than likely that the surname is Norman in origin, for someone who lived at a crossing place or at a place so named (compare French Travers 3). The presence of the preposition ‘de’ (and perhaps also ‘le’) in early forms of the surname appears to indicate a topographic or habitational explanation, but the French preposition and definite article were sometimes added gratuitously to Norman surnames as a sign of their high social status. See also Travers 1.

variants.name: Travers
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Travis 1 and a cognate of 3 below, or a variant of Trevors, itself a variant of Trevor .
Irish (Leitrim and Donegal; of Anglo-Norman origin): variant of   Trower  .

French: topographic name for someone who lived at a crossing place, Old French travers, or a habitational name from (Le) Travers, the name of several places in various parts of France, named with this word.

variants.name: Traverse
meanings: English (Lancashire; of Norman origin): variant of   Travis  .

nameMeanings.name: Vanessa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name invented by Jonathan Swift ( 1667–1745 ) for his friend Esther Vanhomrigh . It seems to have been derived from the first syllable of her (Dutch) surname, with the addition of the suffix -essa (perhaps influenced by the first syllable of her given name). The name became fairly popular in the 20th century, being borne for example by the actress Vanessa Redgrave ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Vanessa Travis was born in 1545, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Eugene Travis, was 25 and her mother, Sarah Lockard, was 20. She married William Ragsdale in 1569, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1609, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vanessa Travis est née en 1545, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eugene Travis, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Lockard, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Ragsdale en 1569, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1609, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Sie hat 1569 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William Ragsdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1609 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

Lei sposato William Ragsdale nel 1569, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1609, all'età di 64 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vanessa Travis родилась в 1545 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Eugene Travis было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Lockard, 20. Она умерла в 1609 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
